---
name: "✨ Feature Request"
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for The Vault
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Describe the Problem

Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe it. (e.g., "I need a way to store secrets using a different KMS adapter...")

## Describe the Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, API payload designs, or diagrams about the feature request here.
